use_cases: Real-time microphone volume visualization in voice chat applications
Audio level monitoring in podcasting or recording software
Visual feedback for voice command interfaces
Audio spectrum display in music production tools
Live audio activity indicators in streaming applications
ai_summary: A bar visualizer component that leverages the Web Audio API to capture audio input from a media stream and render real-time volume levels as animated bars on a canvas. It exports a custom useAudioVolume hook for audio analysis and handles WebAudioContext setup, including support for Safari's webkit prefix. Designed for applications requiring live audio feedback or voice activity visualization.
